en: David and the chiefs of the service also set apart for the service the sons of Asaph, and of Heman, and of Jeduthun, who prophesied with lyres, with harps, and with cymbals. The list of those who did the work and of their duties was:
zh: 大衛和軍隊的領袖，也給亞薩、希幔和耶杜頓的子孫分派了任務，叫他們用琴瑟響鈸說預言。他們任職的人數如下：

en: Of the sons of Asaph: Zaccur, Joseph, Nethaniah, and Asharelah, sons of Asaph, under the direction of Asaph, who prophesied under the direction of the king.
zh: 亞薩的兒子有撒刻、約瑟、尼探雅和亞薩利拉；亞薩的兒子都歸亞薩指揮，遵照王的旨意說預言。

en: Of Jeduthun, the sons of Jeduthun: Gedaliah, Zeri, Jeshaiah, Shimei, Hashabiah, and Mattithiah, six, under the direction of their father Jeduthun, who prophesied with the lyre in thanksgiving and praise to the LORD.
zh: 至於耶杜頓，他的兒子有基大利、西利、耶篩亞、示每、哈沙比雅和瑪他提雅，共六人，都歸他們 的父親耶杜頓指揮。耶杜頓用琴說預言，稱謝和讚美耶和華。

en: Of Heman, the sons of Heman: Bukkiah, Mattaniah, Uzziel, Shebuel and Jerimoth, Hananiah, Hanani, Eliathah, Giddalti, and Romamti-ezer, Joshbekashah, Mallothi, Hothir, Mahazioth.
zh: 至於希幔，他的兒子有布基雅、瑪探雅、烏薛、細布業、耶利摩、哈拿尼雅、哈拿尼、以利亞他、基大利提、羅幔提．以謝、約施比加沙、瑪羅提、何提和瑪哈秀。

en: All these were the sons of Heman the king's seer, according to the promise of God to exalt him, for God had given Heman fourteen sons and three daughters.
zh: 這些人都是希幔的兒子；希幔是王的先見，照著 神的話高舉他 。 神賜給希幔十四個兒子，三個女兒。

en: They were all under the direction of their father in the music in the house of the LORD with cymbals, harps, and lyres for the service of the house of God. Asaph, Jeduthun, and Heman were under the order of the king.
zh: 這些人都歸他們的父親指揮，在耶和華的殿裡歌頌，用響鈸和琴瑟在 神的殿事奉。亞薩、耶杜頓和希幔都是由王指揮的。

en: The number of them along with their brothers, who were trained in singing to the LORD, all who were skillful, was 288.
zh: 他們和他們的親族，在歌頌耶和華的事上受過特別訓練，精於歌唱的，人數共有二百八十八人。

en: And they cast lots for their duties, small and great, teacher and pupil alike.
zh: 這些人，無論大小，不分師生，都一同抽籤分班次。

en: The first lot fell for Asaph to Joseph; the second to Gedaliah, to him and his brothers and his sons, twelve;
zh: 第一籤抽出來的是亞薩的兒子約瑟；第二籤是基大利，他和他的兄弟、兒子，共十二人；

en: the third to Zaccur, his sons and his brothers, twelve;
zh: 第三籤是撒刻，他和他的兒子、兄弟，共十二人；

en: the fourth to Izri, his sons and his brothers, twelve;
zh: 第四籤是伊洗利，他和他的兒子、兄弟，共十二人；

en: the fifth to Nethaniah, his sons and his brothers, twelve;
zh: 第五籤是尼探雅，他和他的兒子、兄弟，共十二人；

en: the sixth to Bukkiah, his sons and his brothers, twelve;
zh: 第六籤是布基雅，他和他的兒子、兄弟，共十二人；

en: the seventh to Jesharelah, his sons and his brothers, twelve;
zh: 第七籤是耶撒利拉，他和他的兒子、兄弟，共十二人；

en: the eighth to Jeshaiah, his sons and his brothers, twelve;
zh: 第八籤是耶篩亞，他和他的兒子、兄弟，共十二人；

en: the ninth to Mattaniah, his sons and his brothers, twelve;
zh: 第九籤是瑪探雅，他和他的兒子、兄弟，共十二人；

en: the tenth to Shimei, his sons and his brothers, twelve;
zh: 第十籤是示每，他和他的兒子、兄弟，共十二人；

en: the eleventh to Azarel, his sons and his brothers, twelve;
zh: 第十一籤是亞薩烈，他和他的兒子、兄弟，共十二人；

en: the twelfth to Hashabiah, his sons and his brothers, twelve;
zh: 第十二籤是哈沙比雅，他和他的兒子、兄弟，共十二人；

en: to the thirteenth, Shubael, his sons and his brothers, twelve;
zh: 第十三籤是書巴業，他和他的兒子、兄弟，共十二人；

en: to the fourteenth, Mattithiah, his sons and his brothers, twelve;
zh: 第十四籤是瑪他提雅，他和他的兒子、兄弟，共十二人；

en: to the fifteenth, to Jeremoth, his sons and his brothers, twelve;
zh: 第十五籤是耶利摩，他和他的兒子、兄弟，共十二人；

en: to the sixteenth, to Hananiah, his sons and his brothers, twelve;
zh: 第十六籤是哈拿尼雅，他和他的兒子、兄弟，共十二人；

en: to the seventeenth, to Joshbekashah, his sons and his brothers, twelve;
zh: 第十七籤是約施比加沙，他和他的兒子、兄弟，共十二人；

en: to the eighteenth, to Hanani, his sons and his brothers, twelve;
zh: 第十八籤是哈拿尼，他和他的兒子、兄弟，共十二人；

en: to the nineteenth, to Mallothi, his sons and his brothers, twelve;
zh: 第十九籤是瑪羅提，他和他的兒子、兄弟，共十二人；

en: to the twentieth, to Eliathah, his sons and his brothers, twelve;
zh: 第二十籤是以利亞他，他和他的兒子、兄弟，共十二人；

en: to the twenty-first, to Hothir, his sons and his brothers, twelve;
zh: 第二十一籤是何提，他和他的兒子、兄弟，共十二人；

en: to the twenty-second, to Giddalti, his sons and his brothers, twelve;
zh: 第二十二籤是基大利提，他和他的兒子、兄弟，共十二人；

en: to the twenty-third, to Mahazioth, his sons and his brothers, twelve;
zh: 第二十三籤是瑪哈秀，他和他的兒子、兄弟，共十二人；

en: to the twenty-fourth, to Romamti-ezer, his sons and his brothers, twelve.
zh: 第二十四籤是羅幔提．以謝，他和他的兒子、兄弟，共十二人。
